description: baseline FLAKY: ~20% of runs fail mid-bench (Kwik StreamClosedException "Connection closed"); p99 ~1.4ms stalls; smoke passes. Pre-existing Kwik robustness issue at bench counts; no cell-level knob found -- blocks the optimization loop.

FLAKINESS FIXED (commit 9088abf): bounded measurement retry on Kwik connection stall + 5s idle timeout; run-iter median-of-7 now reliable. Baseline p50~196us; p99~1.4ms is Kwik spurious-PTO retransmit tail (separate latency trait). Loop now unblocked.
JVM args: generational ZGC + -Xms/Xmx512m + AlwaysPreTouch; p99 -19% (1.40->1.13ms), mean -7%, p50 flat (Kwik structural floor). Only reachable lever -- no PTO knob in Kwik (median-of-7 x3)
